title: System Event
description: An entry in the append-only ledger detailing a structural mutation.

event_type.description: The type of mutation or state change being recorded.

actor.description: The system or human agent that initiated the event.

target_uids.description: The UIDs of entities, relationships, or metrics affected.

payload.description: Specifics of the mutation (e.g., old_slug vs new_slug, parent changes).
